'''竏單h-m-ch''' ('''kadhamach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monochromatize|monochromatize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monochromatize|monochromatize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單h-m-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kadhamach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhamach|thidhamach]] || [[word:jidhamach|jidhamach]] || [[word:shidhamach|shidhamach]] || [[word:kidhamach|kidhamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhamach|thuthudhamach]] || [[word:jujudhamach|jujudhamach]] || [[word:shushudhamach|shushudhamach]] || [[word:kukudhamach|kukudhamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhamach|thudhamach]] || [[word:judhamach|judhamach]] || [[word:shudhamach|shudhamach]] || [[word:kudhamach|kudhamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhamach|thudhamach]] || [[word:judhamach|judhamach]] || [[word:shudhamach|shudhamach]] || [[word:kudhamach|kudhamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhamach|thedhamach]] || [[word:jedhamach|jedhamach]] || [[word:shedhamach|shedhamach]] || [[word:kedhamach|kedhamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhamach|thothodhamach]] || [[word:jojodhamach|jojodhamach]] || [[word:shoshodhamach|shoshodhamach]] || [[word:kokodhamach|kokodhamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhamach|thodhamach]] || [[word:jodhamach|jodhamach]] || [[word:shodhamach|shodhamach]] || [[word:kodhamach|kodhamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhamach|thodhamach]] || [[word:jodhamach|jodhamach]] || [[word:shodhamach|shodhamach]] || [[word:kodhamach|kodhamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdhamach|thﾃｦdhamach]] || [[word:jﾃｦdhamach|jﾃｦdhamach]] || [[word:shﾃｦdhamach|shﾃｦdhamach]] || [[word:kﾃｦdhamach|kﾃｦdhamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhamach|thathadhamach]] || [[word:jajadhamach|jajadhamach]] || [[word:shashadhamach|shashadhamach]] || [[word:kakadhamach|kakadhamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhamach|thadhamach]] || [[word:jadhamach|jadhamach]] || [[word:shadhamach|shadhamach]] || [[word:kadhamach|kadhamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhamach|thadhamach]] || [[word:jadhamach|jadhamach]] || [[word:shadhamach|shadhamach]] || [[word:kadhamach|kadhamach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhamach|shadhamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhamach|goshadhamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhamach|gokishadhamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhamachnﾃｼ|shadhamachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhamachnknﾃｼ|goshadhamachnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhamachnﾃｼ|gokishadhamachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhamachshﾃｫ|shadhamachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkshﾃｫ|goshadhamachnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhamachshﾃｫ|gokishadhamachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhamachro|shadhamachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkro|goshadhamachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhamachro|gokishadhamachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhamachmu|shadhamachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkmu|goshadhamachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhamachmu|gokishadhamachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhamachsher|shadhamachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhamachnksher|goshadhamachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhamachsher|gokishadhamachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhamachng|shadhamachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkng|goshadhamachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhamachng|gokishadhamachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhamachya|shadhamachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkya|goshadhamachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhamachya|gokishadhamachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhamachyam|shadhamachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkyam|goshadhamachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhamachyam|gokishadhamachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhamachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shadhamachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhamachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshadhamachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhamachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishadhamachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhamachnﾃｼro|shadhamachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhamachnknﾃｼro|goshadhamachnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhamachnﾃｼro|gokishadhamachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhamachnﾃｼmu|shadhamachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhamachnknﾃｼmu|goshadhamachnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhamachnﾃｼmu|gokishadhamachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhamachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shadhamachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshadhamachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhamachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishadhamachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhamachshﾃｫro|shadhamachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkshﾃｫro|goshadhamachnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhamachshﾃｫro|gokishadhamachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhamachshﾃｫmu|shadhamachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkshﾃｫmu|goshadhamachnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhamachshﾃｫmu|gokishadhamachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhamachronﾃｼ|shadhamachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkronﾃｼ|goshadhamachnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhamachronﾃｼ|gokishadhamachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhamachroshﾃｫ|shadhamachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkroshﾃｫ|goshadhamachnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhamachroshﾃｫ|gokishadhamachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhamachromu|shadhamachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkromu|goshadhamachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhamachromu|gokishadhamachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhamachmunﾃｼ|shadhamachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkmunﾃｼ|goshadhamachnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhamachmunﾃｼ|gokishadhamachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhamachmushﾃｫ|shadhamachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkmushﾃｫ|goshadhamachnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhamachmushﾃｫ|gokishadhamachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhamachmuro|shadhamachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhamachnkmuro|goshadhamachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhamachmuro|gokishadhamachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
